payload.label: fireplace
payload.long_description: Partial close-up of a dark-gray painted fireplace surround with a recessed rectangular firebox opening; interior appears empty and black, surround shows painted texture with slight wear, mantel edge and small objects visible at top-left, and the crop is edge-cut at lower-left. Approximate camera distance ~1.5 m.
